message:
fix(wills-estate): revert axiom count back to twelve — primer lists Axioms 0-11

The primer (public/wills-and-estate-planning-primer.md) explicitly enumerates
12 axioms numbered 0 through 11. The article body was wrong to say "eleven"
(likely miscounting by excluding Axiom 0). Reverts previous commit and fixes
all four body occurrences to match the authoritative primer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -329,7 +329,7 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() { {/* Subtitle */}

- One skill. Eleven axioms. A structured intake that turns a + One skill. Twelve axioms. A structured intake that turns a chaotic family situation into an attorney-ready handoff package.

@@ -610,7 +610,7 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() {

- Eleven axioms. Fourteen cognitive operators + Twelve axioms. Fourteen cognitive operators (Probate-Bypass, Spousal-Rights Check, Beneficiary-Title Coherence, Step-Up-vs-Transfer, Liquidity-at-Death, Incapacity-Transition, Lumpy-Asset Division, Cross-State @@ -1112,7 +1112,7 @@ jsm install wills-and-estate-planning-skill`}

- There are eleven axioms in the skill's kernel; I will not list + There are twelve axioms in the skill's kernel; I will not list all of them here. But three more are load-bearing and worth naming.

@@ -1745,7 +1745,7 @@ jsm install wills-and-estate-planning-skill`}

The skill separates two kinds of knowledge. The evergreen - methodology — the kernel's eleven axioms, the cognitive + methodology — the kernel's twelve axioms, the cognitive operators, the tier-routing logic, the coordination discipline — is stable. Those are the parts you can trust. The volatile law — current thresholds, current formalities, current{" "}
